case_title: ROBERT J. SHEPPARD VS. JOYCE GARCIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,758.75 FILED BY SHEPPARD, ROBERT J. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOYCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65) SERVED FEB-09-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOYCE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEPPARD, ROBERT J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOYCE $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,115.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2022 BY JUDGE MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ROBERT J. SHEPPARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. SERVICE IS PROPER BASED ON THE FACT MR. SHEPARD CALLED THE WOODBRIDGE SALON. THE PERSON WHO ANSWERED THE CALL AT THE SALON IDENTIFIED MS. GARCIA BY SAYING SOMEONE WAS ASKING TO SPEAK TO HER AND SHE REFUSED TO TAKE THE CALL AND DID NOT WANT TO SPEAK TO MR. SHEPPARD. SERVICE WAS RENDERED VALID IN OPEN COURT.PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
